ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the financial instrument */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the financial instrument */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Price change since the previous period */,
  "p_change" TEXT /* Percentage change since the previous period */,
  "ma5" TEXT /* 5-day moving average price */,
  "ma10" TEXT /* 10-day moving average price */,
  "ma20" TEXT /* 20-day moving average price */,
  "v_ma5" TEXT /* 5-day moving average volume */,
  "v_ma10" TEXT /* 10-day moving average volume */,
  "v_ma20" TEXT /* 20-day moving average volume */,
  "turnover" TEXT /* Turnover of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume weighted average price */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Bid price */,
  "ask_price" TEXT /* Ask price */,
  "last_trade_price" TEXT /* Last trade price */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol assigned to a security for trading purposes */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector in which the financial instrument operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company or instrument is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial instrument is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the exchange opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the exchange closes */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the exchange's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for each user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio */,
  "initial_value" TEXT /* Initial value of the portfolio */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the holding belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument held */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Purchase price of the financial instrument */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the financial instrument was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the holding */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current price of the financial instrument */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument involved in the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading activity */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument involved in the activity */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the financial instrument was bought or sold */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the activity is associated with */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, canceled) */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee associated with the trading activity */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument for which the indicator is calculated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the indicator calculation */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Calculated value of the technical indicator */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "related_instruments" TEXT /* List of financial instruments related to the news */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the sentiment of the news (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)
